channel.title: Greenline News Blog
channel.description: Plain-English articles on investing and crypto for beginners.

item.title: What Is a Stock Split and Why Do Companies Do Them?
item.description: Everything you need to know about stock splits — why companies do them, whether they make a stock cheaper, and what it means for your portfolio.

item.title: How to Read a Candlestick Chart (Without Getting Overwhelmed)
item.description: Candlestick charts look complicated but they're actually simple once you know what each part means.

item.title: Robinhood vs Public: Which Is Better for Beginners in 2026?
item.description: A side-by-side look at two of the most popular beginner investing apps.
